title: The forgotten NLU: The politics of deliberate denial
description: The dream of giving law students a chance to go to the National Law University (NLU) has not yet been realised by the State of Uttarakhand over the course of 15 years. The step taken by the legislature on April 21, 2011 in terms of passing the Uttarakhand National Law University Act, 2011 has yet to be realised.On June 19, 2018, the High Court of Uttarakhand passed certain definite directions for the establishment of a National Law University and its functioning.
